title: rumohra pubescens
intro: Rumohra pubescens, also known as the Lady Palm or Lady Fern, is a tropical evergreen fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rumohra pubescens include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Rumohra pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
